title: La moartea unui mare ziar
summary: The article examines the deliberate destruction of The Washington Post by Jeff Bezos as a symptom of a broader crisis in free press, drawing parallels with Romania's post-1990 media decline. The author argues that political capture of newsrooms, social media algorithms that amplify rage, and audience tribalization have eroded democratic discourse and eliminated reference media in both the US and Romania.
talking_points: Jeff Bezos is deliberately undermining The Washington Post, a paper that once brought down President Nixon and exemplified press as the fourth estate
Romania experienced similar media capture after 1990, with newspaper owners becoming politically compromised through tax evasion blackmail or financial incentives
Social media algorithms reward fury over truth, radicalizing audiences who no longer need or trust professional journalists
The loss of shared narratives and consensus on basic facts has tribalized even compassion and suffering
Press deregulation and partisan capture transformed journalists from democracy's watchdogs into establishment guard dogs
author: Doina Popescu
